title: Wanaka Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap has hit Wanaka, with a Z-Score of -3.60. This event is rated as CRITICAL with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Wanaka are extremely cold, with a high degree day (HDD) value of 13.6 GG. 
 The humidity level is at 84%, and the wind speed is 0.5 km/h, contributing to the chill factor. 
 The cold snap is expected to have significant impacts on various sectors, including agriculture, logistics, and energy.
conclusion: Immediate action is required to mitigate the effects of this severe cold snap.
